episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 319
episode.description: James & Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in Modern MTGO meta shifts, fast mover card prices, specs to watch and offer up our thoughts on the April Secret Lair Super Drop and the latest Streets of New Capenna previews.
